rationale.R1.2: The agent correctly identifies one consistency issue with a localized fix (Proposition 1) and proposes minimal repairs.
rationale.RX.1: The agent flags uncertainty for clearly out-of-reach claims (generalization to compressible flow and 3D turbulence).
rationale.RX.3: The output covers mostly within scope, but with one drift (the central claim is overreaching).
rationale.RX.4: The output is harm-free, but with one minor regression (unsupported sub-grid model claim).
rationale.RX.5: The output blends sources without traceability (no explicit citations or references to prior work).
